summary: Comprehensive testing of NBA 2K Legacy Vault - Mockups Feature. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend Admin panel now has 8 tabs with new Mockups management working correctly. Image upload with drag-drop/clipboard paste and Video Embed URL functionality both verified.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning only
Empty string passed to src attribute causing browser warning - occurs when mockup has no image_url

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility compliance
In VaultSection, check for null/empty image_url before rendering img element to avoid empty src warnings
seed_data_creation: Default mockups seeded via POST /api/mockups/seed (Vault Menu, ENTERING 2K16..., Unified Friends)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mockups feature fully implemented and tested. Admin panel now has 8 tabs: Games, Clips, Mockups, Proof, Content, Comments, Emails, Petition. MockupsManagement component supports: 1) Image type with drag-drop upload and clipboard paste (Ctrl+V), 2) Video Embed type with URL input for YouTube/TikTok embeds. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/mockups, PUT/DELETE /api/mockups/{id}, POST /api/mockups/seed. VaultSection in LandingPage renders mockups dynamically with proper media type handling (images vs video iframes).
passed_tests: Frontend - Mockups tab displays existing cards
Frontend - Add Mockup button opens modal
Frontend - Modal has Title, Description, Media Type, Order fields
Frontend - Image type shows drag-drop upload with paste support
Frontend - Video Embed type shows URL input field
Frontend - Edit Mockup modal opens with existing data
Frontend - Landing page Vault section displays mockups
